creator: davidt@yadt.co.uk
text:
On Mon, 08 Oct 2001, David Taylor wrote:
> 	The current ircd-hybrid port is very out of date, and the maintainer
> 	has no time to update it.
> 
> 	This updates the port from ircd-hybrid-5.3p8 to ircd-hybrid-6.2,
> 	and sets me as the maintainer.
> 
> 	(A diff would be roughly double the size of the shar)

Also, this supersedes PR 20301...

Maybe ircd-hybrid (5.3p8) should be repocopied to ircd-hybrid-5 first,
however, hybrid-5 is unsupported, and should probably should just be left in
history...


-- 
David Taylor
davidt@yadt.co.uk
